title: CashLife (Season 5 of zLife)
description: This is a Life-Series inspired datapack/mod. All players start with $40,000. Can you survive with friends? Or will your world fall into bloodshed?
body:
You Start The season on $40,000
Below 40,000 is Dark Green

Below 30,000 is green

Below 20,000 is yellow 

Below 10,000 is red 

Every time you die you lose $500-$5000

When you get a kill you get $500-$2500

If you go below $0 you go into debt, when you go into debt you have a 30 minute non-regenerating timer if that timer hits 0 you are out of the season and if you go below $-5000 you are out as well
